name: Cinnamon Rolls
recipeIngredient: Required amount of dough for Parker House or Icebox rolls
Roll sheet to a thickness of 1/2 to 3/4 inch
Generously spread melted butter, brown sugar, and cinnamon over the dough
Roll up like a jelly roll, then cut into 1-inch slices
Place cut side down onto a well-buttered pan
Allow to rise in a warm place until doubled in size
recipeInstructions:
Preheat oven to 375°F.
Bake in moderate oven at 375°F.
